headline: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Wins $465 Million Army Contract For Next-Generation Night-Vision System
summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) is among the 10 Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now. On Monday, the company announced that it had received a seven-year contract worth around $465 million from the U.S. Army under the Binocular Night Observation Device (BiNOD) program. The defense contractor is one of the companies chosen to support […]
